ddls:
CREATE TABLE "microplankton_data" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of data collection */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cell or location */,
  "d1" INTEGER /* First physical characteristic */,
  "d2" INTEGER /* Second physical characteristic */,
  "fsc_small" INTEGER /* Small forward scatter value */,
  "fsc_perp" INTEGER /* Perpendicular forward scatter value */,
  "fsc_big" INTEGER /* Big forward scatter value */,
  "pe" INTEGER /* Particle event value */,
  "chl_small" INTEGER /* Small chlorophyll value */,
  "chl_big" INTEGER /* Big chlorophyll value */,
  "pop" TEXT /* Population type */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the collection location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the collection location */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the data was collected */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for collection */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research vessel */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling interval */,
  "environmental_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental condition */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for dataset versioning */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id", "time", "cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microplankton_data_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES sampling_intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microplankton_data_environmental_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("environmental_condition_id") REFERENCES environmental_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microplankton_data_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES research_vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microplankton_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microplankton_data_pop FOREIGN KEY ("pop") REFERENCES microplankton_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the research vessel */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country owning the research vessel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the research vessel (e.g., research ship, submarine) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vessel in terms of crew and equipment */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research vessel where the instrument is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument's capabilities */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling interval */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling interval */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sampling interval */,
  "interval_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sampling interval in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental condition */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the environmental condition at the time of collection */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the environmental condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microplankton_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microplankton type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the microplankton type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microplankton type */,
  "average_size" REAL /* Average size of the microplankton type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES microplankton_data ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_files" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the metadata file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the metadata file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the metadata file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES microplankton_data ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division within the affiliation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES microplankton_data ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microplankton type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend observation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend observation */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the observed trend */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES microplankton_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental impact */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental condition */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microplankton type */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the observed impact */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the impact observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_impact_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES microplankton_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_impact_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES environmental_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaboration team */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaboration team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the team member's involvement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the team member's involvement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES collaboration_teams ("team_id")
)
